projectDescription: A responsive HTML/CSS website showcasing a fictional shopping center renovation project in Granada, Spain.
keyFeatures: Fully responsive design with mobile-first approach
CSS custom properties for consistent theming
Hamburger menu navigation for mobile devices
Contact form with dynamic profile-based fields
publicApiSurface: index.html - Homepage with hero section and feature cards
ocio.html - Entertainment and leisure offerings page
gastro.html - Gastronomy and dining options page
proyecto.html - Project details and architectural renders
style.css - Complete styling system with CSS variables
